mapper.select: SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, DATE_FORMAT(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE USE_STPLAT_ID=#{useStplatId}

SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, DATE_FORMAT(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE REPRSNT_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY APLC_DE DESC, USE_STPLAT_ID DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, DATE_FORMAT(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, '%Y-%m-%d') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE 1=1
AND USE_STPLAT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND USE_STPLAT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY USE_STPLAT_NM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE 1=1
AND RECOMEND_SITE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND RECOMEND_SITE_URL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
